response: Write an email to Mr. [Last Name], thanking him for his helpful and detailed response; let him know that there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision system, which is a FLIR fl3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this device is a Sony IMX172, not an e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data to this email). Please refer to page 18 of the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference pdf file for detailed datasheet information, and for Quantum efficiency, refer to page 13 of the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging pdf file. I will study the files and manuals more carefully and inform you.
